verdict: Hiring campaign is delivering applicants cheaply, but customer-side sales pipeline shows zero revenue this period.
diagnosis: Spent $5,107 on a hiring campaign producing 13 leads at $43 each, while the customer sales pipeline generated $0 in opportunity value.

signals.headline: 13 hiring leads at $43 each
signals.detail: Cost per applicant beats most home services benchmarks. Carlos Martin (3-5 years experience) is the latest applicant from Facebook.

signals.headline: $0 in open sales pipeline
signals.detail: Every open opportunity this period carries zero dollar value. Sales-side lead generation is missing entirely from paid spend.

signals.headline: 37 calls, 73 direction requests
signals.detail: Google Business Profile is doing real work. Reviews averaged a perfect 5 stars across 10 new reviews this period.

signals.headline: 168 link clicks from 153K impressions
signals.detail: Instagram reach is wide but shallow. Click-through to the website stays well under one percent.

signals.headline: 168 Instagram followers, 110 follows
signals.detail: Audience is small for a paid account. Organic growth added only 10 followers in 28 days.

market_context: {"benchmark": {"label": "Benchmark", "subheader": "HVAC lead costs vary widely by channel", "body": "<cite index="8-3">LocaliQ benchmarks put HVAC search ads near $45 per lead</cite>. <cite index="9-2,9-3">Google Ads averages $100-$110 blended, with non-branded search around $149</cite>. Your $43 applicant cost sits at the low end."}, "seasonal": {"label": "Seasonal", "subheader": "Summer cooling drives peak HVAC demand", "body": "<cite index="5-6">HVAC keyword costs spike during summer cooling and winter heating periods</cite>. June is prime AC repair season, yet zero customer-acquisition spend is running while the hiring campaign absorbs the budget."}, "competitor": {"label": "Competitor", "subheader": "Speed and reviews decide who wins", "body": "<cite index="14-9">66% of home services say lead follow-up is a major challenge</cite>. <cite index="8-5">CallRail reports 14% missed-call rates and 78% of customers hire whoever responds first</cite>."}}

recommendations.title: Launch a parallel summer AC repair campaign
recommendations.detail: Consider redirecting a portion of the $5,107 hiring budget toward booked-job acquisition. June is peak cooling season and the current pipeline shows zero customer opportunities.

recommendations.title: Test Google Local Services Ads for booked jobs
recommendations.detail: Worth exploring given your 5-star reviews and 37 call clicks. Local Services Ads typically run $25-$75 per lead and reward strong review profiles.

recommendations.title: Tighten Instagram targeting around Orland Park radius
recommendations.detail: 153K impressions produced only 168 link clicks. Test tighter creative or audience around the 10-mile Orland Park zone before expanding spend.
